# launch-fix

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Adds a Fix button to the plugin crash banner that launches an agent on the auto-created crash task with optional freeform context.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `ErrorBoundary.Action` → `LaunchFixButton`
